task_completion.description: Select Dive #85 in the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dive #85 (Date: Sep 29, 2011, Location: Yellow House) is highlighted or selected in the main dive list panel.

task_completion.description: Focus on the Tags input field for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor is active inside the 'Tags' text box in the dive details/information panel.

task_completion.description: Add the 'deep' tag to the dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'deep' is typed into the Tags field or appears as a distinct tag token in the dive details panel.

task_completion.description: Add the 'deco' tag to the dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'deco' is typed into the Tags field or appears as a distinct tag token alongside 'deep'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save' button in the dive details panel is clicked, the main toolbar 'Save' icon is clicked, or the tags are finalized and the unsaved changes indicator disappears.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Subsurface GUI to add the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Subsurface application window being used, rather than a text editor modifying the underlying XML/SSRF file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing commands (like sed, awk, or xmlstarlet) to directly alter the dive data file.

integrity.description: The tags were added to the correct dive.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tags 'deep' and 'deco' are specifically associated with Dive #85 (Yellow House, Sept 29, 2011) and not applied globally or to the wrong dive.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Dive Number: 85. Target Dive Date: 2011-09-29 (September 29, 2011). Target Dive Location: Yellow House. Expected Tags to add: 'deep' and 'deco'.
